title: Portuguese Ham Frittata
description: A Portuguese-inspired omelette-style frittata filled with ham and spices. Perfect for a quick breakfast or snack.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat.
Add diced ham and cook until browned.
In a large bowl, whisk eggs and dried floral.
Add shredded cheese and stir until combined.
Pour egg mixture over cooked ham in skillet.
Transfer skillet to oven and bake for 15-20 minutes.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Use a spatula to carefully loosen edges of frittata from skillet.
Slide frittata onto a plate and serve hot.
